query:

[Assistant] Clean slate committed. Resuming at Phase 1b — scope risk assessment against the corrected SCOPE.md.
[tool: Bash(git push 2>&1) → To https://github.com/dug-21/unimatrix
   0160eeb..bd465bb  feature/col-031 -> feature/col-031]
[tool: Bash(cd /workspaces/unimatrix && \
  git add -A product/features/col-031/ && \
  git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
refactor(col-03) → [feature/col-031 bd465bb] refactor(col-031): fix rank formula + ts type; wipe stale design artifacts (#414)
 19 files changed, 17 insertions(+), 2390 deletions(-)
 delete mode 100644 product/features/col-031/ACCEPTANCE-MAP.md
 delete mode 100644 product/features/col-031/ALIGNMENT-REPORT.md
 delete m]
[tool: Bash(cd /workspaces/unimatrix/product/features/col-031 && \
  rm -rf architecture/ specification/ agents/ && \
  rm -f SCOPE-) → SCOPE.md]
[Assistant] Now wipe all stale artifacts, keeping only SCOPE.md:
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
Git stash conflicts during scope pivots can silently lose completed work
Moving a pre-loop extraction block when inserting a new pipeline step in search.rs
